title: aspidosperma album
intro: Aspidosperma album, also known as the white Aspidosperma tree, is a plant species native to Central and South America, belonging to the Apocynaceae family. The medicinal properties of Aspidosperma album include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of the plant include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Aspidosperma album can be prepared into herbal remedies like decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various diseases.
